content:
Übersicht

Brașov ist eine Stadt in Brașov mit 253,200 Einwohnern. The jewel of Transylvania, set against the Carpathian Mountains, famous for its medieval Saxon old town, the nearby Bran Castle, and year-round outdoor activities.
